text:
Dutch artist Francien Krieg (1973) lives countryside middle Netherlands with children husband, working fulltime studio.
graduates from Royal Academy Hague 1998, obtaining degree Monumental Art, which brings think conceptually during which discovers fascination human body.
expresses fascination human body paintings with unusual body perspectives.
Soon work been picked collectors galleries.
becomes part important Dutch collections like Collection former Scheringa Collection.
better galleries Netherlands, Gallery Mokum Amsterdam, picks quality work initiates cooperation.
Francien's career development brings works shown exhibitions like fair Scope Basel, fair Realisme Amsterdam, Robert Lange Studios Charleston USA, From motion Stillness Zhou Center Chicago, Women painting women Townsend Atelier, Chattanooga, [r]evolution Tennessee, recently exhibition Stark Realism Beinart Gallery Brunswick, Australia, featuring Effie Pryer Ville Lopponen.
2017, nominated Dutch Portrait Award shortlisted Figurativas 2017 MEAM Barcelona.
Additionally, work published Austrian magazine Milionart Kaleidoscope featuring three-page article.
Also recently, work family issue Poets Artists, curated Shana Levenson David Kassan.
